error_signature: Forbidden: bot can’t initiate conversation with a user
title: Telegram bot cannot initiate conversation
symptom: When trying to send a message using the Telegram node, n8n returns 'Forbidden: bot can’t initiate conversation with a user'.
applies_when: Using Telegram bot in business mode
Sending messages to users in private chats
not_this_if: Using a regular chat without business connection
root_cause: Telegram's API restricts bots from initiating conversations with users unless they are connected through a business account. The bot must use a valid `business_connection_id` to send messages in this context.
fix_steps: Extract the `business_connection_id` and `chat.id` from the JSON response received from Telegram.
Add an HTTP Request node to your workflow.
Set the request method to POST and specify the Telegram API endpoint for sending messages.
In the Body Parameters, include `chat_id`, `text`, and `business_connection_id` with the appropriate values.
agent_instruction: Configure the HTTP Request node to include the business_connection_id when sending messages.
